name: Octoberfest Beer Festival Munich Tour with Wolfgang - VR Travel

reviews.review_description: Thank you so much for all the videos you created for VR. Sometimes I can see the looks of people wondering “what is that contraption on his head”? They don’t know the great thing you’re doing. With you I fully experienced some places and what I like the most is your casual realistic walk, like a walk from the everyday life. That is THE best thing about your videos. Wolfgang is a great man, beautiful human being explaining calmly about all the interesting things about the festival, say hello to him! :) And once again thank you so much, I really hope that you will continue making this VR 360 videos! Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Very bad experience, wish I can refund.
reviews.review_description:
[WARNING] Meta refund policy does not cover bundle purchase, be aware of this otherwise you'll regret like me. All apps from this developer are in very low resolution streaming (I have 1000Mbps internet speed and I've tried half of them in the biggest bundle that consists of 25 apps at the moment). There are no chapters and no fast forward function. The resume function also disappears after a while since you exit from the app, then you have to restart from the beginning which is quite annoying. The festival itself seems fun and the tour guide is nice, but sadly the above mentioned problems destroyed the overall experience. Hope the developer can improve all of his apps accordingly.

-1 Star for the resolution quality
0 Star for the functionality
4 Stars for the contents
Overall 1 star

developer_response.body: Please update the app to ensure you are using the latest version. We have upgraded our streaming servers, and we hope this will significantly improve your experience. Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
I bought this cool app in a bundle, in itself a great value package. I've never been to the Oktoberfest in Munich. Only once in Stuttgart years ago, which is much much smaller.
In Munich everything is big. Hofbraeu tent is ginormous and nicely decorated. I liked the vibe there. I also liked the stall with Steckelfisch (I hope I spelled it properly). The tour guide Wolfgang is great, he's very knowlegeable, giving info discreetly and concisely.

reviews.review_title: Join me in this VR Tour - Wolfgang
reviews.review_description:
This is a virtual tour of the Octoberfest in Munich. Join Wolfgang Brehm (the official city guide of Munich) through the Octoberfest in Munich. This tour was recorded in 360 degree virtual reality and can be enjoyed with a VR headset like the Meta Quest 3.
You can look in all directions during the tour and get a unique impression of the biggest folk festival in the world. It has been held annually since 1810 on the Theresienwiese in Munich.
Experience the most important beer tents (also from inside), the Bavaria (incl. ascent to the head), the old Octoberfest (traditional festival and shoe platters) and many attractions such as a round trip on the ferris wheel.
Let yourself be carried away into the world of Bavarian traditions, Dirndl & Lederhosen, beer tents, Munich’s beer, Bavarian music, beer mugs, shoe platters, chain carousel, giant wheel and many more.
The tour starts at the main entrance and shows all the top sights.
